description: Configure GeoServer (admin/Admin123!) to serve Natural Earth shapefiles currently located at /home/ga/natural_earth/. The shapefiles must be accessible to the GeoServer container at /opt/geoserver/data_dir/shp_data/. Establish a workspace named shp_ne (URI: http://shp_ne.example.org) and a directory-based store named shp_directory. Publish the layers ne_110m_admin_0_countries (Title: 'Countries (Shapefile)') and ne_110m_lakes (Title: 'Lakes (Shapefile)') with EPSG:4326 and calculated bounding boxes. Save WMS GetMap images for the countries and lakes layers to /home/ga/countries_map.png and /home/ga/lakes_map.png respectively.
